---
title: "For Vendors"
description: "How service vendors use SpotlightVendor — build a verified profile, respond to RFPs, manage compliance, and grow your win rate with senior living and healthcare facilities."
---

If you provide services to senior living or healthcare facilities — janitorial, HVAC, plumbing, landscaping, electrical, life safety, food service, IT, equipment maintenance — SpotlightVendor connects you with operators looking for compliant, vetted vendors. A facility you already work with may have invited you here. Or you may have signed up directly. Either way, this is your starting point.

## What you get on SpotlightVendor

| | |
|---|---|
| **One verified profile, every facility** | Upload your W-9, COI, and Workers' Comp once. Every facility you work with sees your current status — no more "send me your insurance cert" email chains. |
| **RFPs matched to your services** | Once verified, RFPs that fit your service categories and area show up in your dashboard, sorted by proximity. |
| **Pending requests dashboard** | When a facility needs additional documents (e.g., a state-specific requirement), it shows up as a pending request you can act on directly. |
| **In-app chat with managers** | Project conversations stay inside the platform, tied to the project. No tracking down email threads. |
| **Performance metrics** | See your proposals submitted, win rate, completion rate, and active projects — week, month, or year view. Track your own track record. |
| **Self-serve subscription** | Cancel, upgrade, update payment — all in your settings. No support emails needed. |

## The fastest path to your first won bid

1. **Complete your profile** — name, services, service area, employees, year established, business type. The more complete, the more facility managers trust you.
2. **Upload your compliance documents** — W-9, COI, Workers' Comp. Our admin team reviews within 1-2 business days.
3. **Watch the RFP feed.** Once verified, RFPs that match your services and service area show up in your dashboard. They're sorted by distance from your service area.
4. **Bid early.** Most facilities review bids in the order they come in. The first 3-5 bids get the most attention.
5. **Track performance over time.** Your win rate and completion rate become a credibility signal facilities can see.

Questions? Email [hi@spotlightvendor.com](mailto:hi@spotlightvendor.com).
